items.title: Cuba's mothers-to-be prepare to give birth in a country plunged into darkness
items.dek: Two pregnant women tell the BBC's Will Grant of their hopes and fears as their nation is mired in crisis.

items.title: China dials back on fuel price hikes to 'reduce burden' on drivers
items.dek: It comes as countries across the region are taking various measures to weather the soaring cost of fuel.
